Department Chair's Message

MENU

Asst. Prof. Ceren Aycanoğlu

Head of Department

Dear Students,

The Department of
Nursing at Istanbul Okan University, Faculty of Health Sciences, has been
continuing its educational activities since 2009 with the aim of educating
qualified nurses in line with the scientific and ethical foundations of the
nursing profession. Our department aims to educate nurses who are sensitive to
the health needs of individuals, families, and society; respectful of patient
rights; committed to ethical values; capable of critical thinking; and able to
provide evidence-based care, in accordance with the principles and reforms of
Atatürk.

Our educational program
is structured on an approach that integrates theory and practice, is supported
by contemporary knowledge and technologies, and emphasizes teamwork and
lifelong learning. Together with our academic staff and students, we continue
our efforts to educate highly competent nurses who are preferred at national
and international levels. I wish all students who join the Department of
Nursing a successful, productive, and enriching educational journey.
